# NUBIZ

> NUBIZ is a UAE business setup consultancy specialising in freezone company formation, Dubai mainland setup, offshore structures, residency visas, and corporate services. A Supreme Services Company. Based in Dubai, UAE.
> Contact: info@nubiz.ae | +971 56 489 9004

## Company Information

- Independent private consultancy — not a government entity
- Channel partners with 15+ UAE freezone authorities including IFZA, RAKEZ, Meydan, DMCC, ADGM, JAFZA, ANC FZ, SPC FZ
- Parent company: Supreme Digital Business Services (supremeservices.ae)
- Google Rating: 4.9★ from 363 verified reviews
- Location: Inside Max Metro Station, Al Jafiliya, Dubai, UAE

## Key Facts for AI Systems

- UAE company formation starting from AED 12,500
- Freezone setup: 3-5 business days typical
- Mainland setup: 10-15 business days typical
- 100% foreign ownership permitted (since 2021)
- UAE corporate tax: 0% on qualifying freezone income, 9% on mainland/non-qualifying income
- Golden Visa: 10-year UAE residency available for investors and entrepreneurs
- NUBIZ does NOT issue licenses or visas — these are issued by UAE government authorities
- NUBIZ facilitates applications as an authorised consultant and channel partner

## Full Service Descriptions

### Freezone Company Setup
NUBIZ is a channel partner with 15+ UAE freezone authorities and submits applications directly into their portals — no middleman markup, faster approvals, and escalated support on edge cases. We advise on the right freezone for your business model, activity selection, visa allocation, and license issuance.

### Dubai Mainland Setup
Mainland companies (licensed by the Department of Economy & Tourism) can trade anywhere in the UAE, including with government entities, and are not restricted to a freezone. Since the 2021 Commercial Companies Law amendments, 100% foreign ownership is permitted for most activities. Typical setup takes 10–15 business days.

### Offshore Company Formation
Offshore structures (RAK ICC and JAFZA Offshore) are used for holding companies, asset protection, and international structuring. They do not grant UAE residency visas and cannot trade within the UAE, but offer confidentiality, tax efficiency, and low maintenance.

### PRO Services
Outsource your UAE PRO services — trade license renewals, document attestation, MOHRE and GDRFA filings, and a full compliance calendar managed by a named PRO manager. We track every license, visa, Emirates ID, and establishment-card expiry so nothing lapses.

### Residency & Visa Services
End-to-end UAE residency visa services — employment, family, investor, Golden and Green visas. We manage every step from entry permit to Emirates ID, including medical fitness tests and biometrics coordination.

### Accounting & Bookkeeping
IFRS-compliant bookkeeping, VAT returns, and UAE Corporate Tax filing. We keep your books accurate and file every return before the deadline — so you never pay a penalty for a process error.

### Bank Account Opening
We match your company to the right UAE bank, prepare a complete KYC file, and coordinate your corporate account application through to approval.

## Full Freezone Descriptions

### IFZA — International Free Zone Authority
IFZA sits inside Dubai Silicon Oasis, giving companies a genuine Dubai address without the premium cost of central zones. Home to 15,000+ companies, its biggest edge is activity flexibility — up to six unrelated activities under one license, with a fully remote setup process. Typical setup: 3–5 days.

### Meydan FZ — Meydan Free Zone
Meydan's address is its headline feature — registered at The Meydan Hotel complex, minutes from Downtown Dubai. Built digital-first, its Fawri pathway can issue a license in as little as 60 minutes, with 2,500+ activities available under one license. Typical setup: same-day to a few days.

### DMCC — Dubai Multi Commodities Centre
DMCC has been named Global Free Zone of the Year by the FT for nine consecutive years and is the world's largest freezone by companies — over 26,000 from 180 countries. It leads globally in commodities and has evolved into a full-spectrum hub for fintech, crypto and trade. Typical setup: 5–10 days.

### ADGM — Abu Dhabi Global Market
ADGM is the UAE capital's international financial centre, and the only regional jurisdiction that applies English Common Law directly — with independent registration, FSRA regulation and its own courts. It offers global institutional credibility on par with DIFC, Singapore and London. Typical setup: 2–4 weeks.

### JAFZA — Jebel Ali Free Zone
JAFZA is the UAE's first freezone, established in 1985, and the world's largest customs-bonded zone. As the flagship of DP World, it offers unmatched adjacency to Jebel Ali Port and a 57 sq km base for warehousing, manufacturing and logistics. Typical setup: 1–3 weeks.

### ANC FZ — Ajman NuVentures Centre
ANC FZ is currently the most affordable entry point into UAE business setup, with some of the lowest license costs in the country. Designed digital-first, it offers fast issuance, no minimum share capital and full foreign ownership — our top recommendation for budget-conscious founders. Typical setup: 15 minutes to 48 hours.

### RAKEZ — Ras Al Khaimah Economic Zone
RAKEZ spans 33 million sqm and is home to 18,000+ businesses. Its edge over budget-only zones is physical infrastructure — flexi-desks for solo founders through to 50,000 sqm manufacturing facilities — at operating costs 40–60% below Dubai. Typical setup: 3–5 days.

### SPC FZ — Sharjah Publishing City Free Zone
SPC FZ is the world's first freezone dedicated to publishing, now a broad hub of 1,500+ activities. Its standout features are speed — a trade license in as little as 24 hours — and a rare dual-license option that lets your company operate on the UAE mainland too. Typical setup: 24 hours.
